response.justification: Strong senior fullstack profile with 13+ years of experience well beyond the 6+ requirement. Primary stack alignment is excellent (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB) with current AI-agent and MCP work directly matching the AI agent development requirement. Demonstrates engineering rigor through TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching. Minor gaps in Nest.js, Kotlin, and explicit cloud breadth, but the depth and adaptability easily compensate.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB experience matching primary stack
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work
Strong craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, pairing, open-source ownership
concerns: Kotlin/Java exposure is dated and limited
Cloud breadth narrow (AWS CDK only; no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown)
